arts.ttl: Jota and Kieran Tierney deals agreed as £40m man snapped up - Celtic's dream January window
arts.sum: There's been plenty of chatter surrounding potential Celtic signings and exits in the January transfer window, which is now open for Brendan Rodgers' squad to be tinkered with

arts.ttl: Arsenal star makes injury return vow after 'patient' Mikel Arteta message
arts.sum: Arsenal star Takehiro Tomiyasu has issued a message to the club's fans as he continues his recovery from injury. On New Year's Eve, Tomiyasu joined several Premier League stars in sending a message to fans to wish them well for the new year ahead.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's January transfer window simulated as £106m spent on three players
arts.sum: Instead, Arsenal's striker interest remained in the Premier League, with the Gunners signing Aston Villa's Jhon Duran for £49million, potentially rising to £64million with add-ons. Arsenal have struggled with their squad depth at times this season, so Mikel Arteta may be tempted to delve into the January transfer market in the new year.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal will be in the market for one of the best players in the world
arts.sum: Arsenal will reportedly be one of the numerous top clubs in the market for Florian Wirtz when it eventually comes to him leaving Bayer Leverkusen. arts.ttl: Money no issue as Arsenal ready to sign wide-forward this month
arts.sum: Arsenal will reportedly have no problem if they decide to spend big this January, with money no issue as they’re expected to focus on signing a wide-forward. arts.ttl: Arsenal's eight-man transfer shortlist leaked - including three Premier League stars
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to act in the January transfer market as they bid to add a forward with Alexander Isak, Nico Williams ans Benjamin Sesko all on their shortlist

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal head across the capital to Brentford in the first Premier League fixture of 2025. Mikel Arteta’s side saw off Ipswich Town last time out to extend their unbeaten run to eight league games, as the Gunners look to close the gap on leaders Liverpool. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford, Jack Grealish and the 10 Premier League players who most need a January transfer
arts.sum: Yet we could still be thrown some treats this time around with a number of star players on the chopping block, and in a lot of cases, a move to pastures new might be in the best interests of all involved parties. The story of the 2024-25 season so far hasn't been rosy for every star player, with some in need of a fresh start elsewhere

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: The venue for the first Premier League match of 2025 is the Gtech Community Stadium as Brentford host London rivals Arsenal. Last time out, the Bees collected a rare point on the road with a 0-0 draw at Brighton.
